title: OrchestratorConfig
description: Configuration schema for the Dark Factory Mass Parallelization Orchestrator. Defines session limits, collision detection mode, branch strategy, integration strategy, and manifest aggregation rules. The orchestrator is a singleton coordinator that decomposes Design Intents into isolated Worker sessions. Part of Phase 5e — Scalable Policy-Bound Autonomy.

version.description: Semantic version of this orchestrator configuration.

max_concurrent_sessions.description: Maximum number of Worker sessions running simultaneously.

max_per_collision_domain.description: Maximum number of Worker sessions operating within a single collision domain.

max_policy_core_sessions.description: Maximum sessions that may modify governance policy/schema artifacts simultaneously. Set to 1 for strict serialization of governance changes.

mode.description: Collision detection mode. 'strict' blocks workers from overlapping collision domains. 'advisory' warns but allows overlap. 'disabled' turns off collision detection.

collision_domains_ref.description: Path to the collision domain configuration file.

conflict_schema_ref.description: Path to the conflict detection schema for recording collisions.

branch_strategy.description: Branch strategy for Worker sessions. 'isolated' = each worker gets its own branch (safest). 'shared_integration' = workers share domain integration branches. 'trunk' = all workers commit to a shared trunk (highest conflict risk).

mode.description: Integration strategy. 'staged' = workers merge into domain branches, then release train, then main. 'direct' = workers merge directly to main (simplest but highest risk). 'release_train' = all workers merge into a time-boxed release branch.

integration_strategy_ref.description: Path to the detailed integration strategy configuration.

enabled.description: Whether the orchestrator aggregates worker manifests into an integration manifest.

integration_manifest_schema_ref.description: Path to the integration manifest schema.

spawn_rules.description: Conditions that must be true before the orchestrator spawns a new worker session.

require_no_unresolved_conflict.description: Do not spawn a new worker if there are unresolved conflicts in its target collision domain.

require_governance_ci_green.description: Do not spawn a new worker if the main branch governance CI is failing.

require_no_blocking_sessions.description: Do not spawn a new worker if a high-risk session is in progress that may destabilize the target domain.

failure_containment.description: Rules for handling worker session failures.

on_worker_failure.description: Action when a worker fails. 'mark_failed' = log failure, do not integrate. 'retry_once' = restart the worker session once. 'escalate' = escalate to human immediately.

update_autonomy_metrics.description: Update autonomy metrics (parallel_efficiency) when a worker fails.
